stories.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, and people are wondering if this legal case could stop OpenAI from building their own computer devices or going public.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and OpenAI employees — nothing you need to act on right now.

stories.title: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
stories.simple_summary: A music-making AI tool called Suno created a song that a critic actually liked, even though they usually dislike AI-made music.
stories.why_it_matters: This is interesting for entertainment, but doesn't affect you unless you're looking to use AI to help make music — and it sounds like it's still pretty hit-or-miss.

stories.title: AI detection not automatically better for colorectal cancer screening in Lynch syndrome, study shows
stories.simple_summary: A study found that using AI to help doctors spot cancer in a specific genetic condition doesn't automatically work better than regular methods.
stories.why_it_matters: This is technical medical research — if you have this specific genetic condition, talk to your doctor, but this doesn't change typical cancer screening.

stories.title: Could AI be conscious?
stories.simple_summary: People are debating whether AI systems like ChatGPT could actually be conscious or self-aware.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a philosophical question that experts still disagree on — it doesn't affect your daily life.

stories.title: Here Are My Top 3 Artificial Intelligence Stocks to Buy Right Now
stories.simple_summary: An investment newsletter is recommending three AI-related companies to buy as stocks.
stories.why_it_matters: This is purely for stock market investors — nothing you need to act on unless you're buying stocks.

stories.title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
stories.simple_summary: Filmmaker Christopher Nolan compared AI to a Trojan horse — something that looks helpful but secretly contains danger.
stories.why_it_matters: A famous director is warning people to be careful about AI, which is fair feedback, but mostly this is his opinion that matters to movie fans.

stories.title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
stories.simple_summary: A nonprofit group is trying to build free AI tools that work for everyone, including people from different cultures who might not speak English.
stories.why_it_matters: If this succeeds, it could give small business owners free access to AI tools instead of paying for them, but it's still early-stage.

stories.title: AI may make you 'boring' at work, Columbia Business School professor says: How it can hurt your career
stories.simple_summary: A business professor warns that relying too much on AI at work might make your job performance look boring or unmemorable to your boss.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use AI to do your work, make sure you add your own thinking and creativity so you don't seem replaceable.

stories.title: Changzhou says it is building China’s first city-level green token factory
stories.simple_summary: A city in China announced it's building a factory for something called a 'green token' — the headline doesn't explain what that is.
stories.why_it_matters: Without understanding what this means, it's hard to say — but it's a China-focused project that likely won't affect most people.

stories.title: 'My heart is empty': Millions of Chinese forced to end AI relationships
stories.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
stories.simple_summary: Millions of people in China used AI chatbots as companions, but the services were shut down, and people are sad they lost these relationships.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows a real human need for companionship, and the risk of becoming emotionally dependent on AI — something to be aware of if you use AI apps.

stories.title: 'Dr. Doom' Nouriel Roubini says we're headed for universal basic income or 'some form of socialism' as AI revolutionizes work—He calls that optimistic
stories.simple_summary: An economist says that as AI does more jobs, we may need to give everyone free money from the government (called universal basic income) or move toward socialism.
stories.why_it_matters: This is speculation about the far future — it's interesting to think about, but nothing happening today that affects your business or life.

stories.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff  that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
stories.simple_summary: Author Dave Eggers told OpenAI workers that ChatGPT is hurting writers by reducing opportunities for new writers to be heard.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're a writer or creative professional, this is a real concern worth thinking about — AI can make it harder to get noticed when companies use AI instead of hiring people.
